message:
fix(core): replace 3 more panicking u32 casts in e2compr write path with fallible conversions

Continues the silent-truncation elimination campaign:
- ulen/clen (uncompressed/compressed data lengths in cluster header) now use
  u32::try_from() returning FfsError::InvalidGeometry instead of bare 'as u32'
- logical_block computation in write_ext4_compressed uses try_from to prevent
  truncation when file offsets exceed 4GB worth of blocks
- existing_len cast uses unwrap_or(u32::MAX) as a safe clamp for the
  read_ext4_compressed length parameter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
